title: conflict_report
description: Output of ConflictDetector. Reports tensions or contradictions found in the extracted constraints.

severity.description: warning = auto-resolvable in QuickClean; blocking = must surface to user.

resolution_recommendation.description: How the conflict can be resolved. Used by OutputBuilder for warning-level auto-resolution.

conflicts.description: All conflicts detected. Empty array when none found.

has_blocking_conflicts.description: True when at least one conflict has severity 'blocking'.

x-hard_rules: has_blocking_conflicts must be true if and only if at least one conflict has severity 'blocking'
blocking conflicts halt QuickClean and StrictClean; user must resolve before output is produced
warning conflicts are auto-resolved in QuickCleanMode; the resolution must appear in diff.resolved_conflicts
empty conflicts array with has_blocking_conflicts: false is valid when no conflicts found
